questionHtml:
The fastest recorded speeds of eight animals are shown in the following table.

For these eight animals write down the standard deviation.
markschemeHtml:
84.6  (84.5597…)(km h−1)   (A1) (C1)

Note: If the response to part (d)(i) is awarded zero marks, a correct response to part (d)(ii) is awarded (C2).

[1 mark]

meta.title: For these eight animals write down the standard deviation.
breadcrumbLabels: SL 4.3—Mean, median, mode. Mean of grouped data, standard deviation. Quartiles, IQR
